generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that over 70% of Americans now support community-based emergency preparedness programs? These local initiatives not only strengthen our national resilience but also empower communities to take charge of their own safety. While some worry about government overreach, these programs actually enhance civil liberties by putting preparedness decisions in the hands of local leaders who understand their communities best. It's a practical way to balance security and freedom. #CommunityPreparedness #NationalSecurity
